security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://raw.githubusercontent.com https://github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com blob: data: ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' blob: data: asset: https://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' blob: data:; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:;
